---
title: "Marianne Bigg Wither"
---

## Marianne Bigg Wither

**Dates:** (11 August 1820- 1900)

### Description

sister of the Rev. William Bigg Wither

### Biography

She shared a birthday with CMY.  She lived with her sister Margaret in Southgate St., Winchester.

### Letters

- Letter from [<i>c</i>.  1900]
- [To Marianne Bigg Wither, March 17 [1899]](../letters/3399_To_Marianne_Bigg_Wither.html)
- [To Marianne Bigg Wither, August, 11[[footnote:1]] 1898.](../letters/3380_To_Marianne_Bigg_Wither.html)
- Letter from May 20, 1897.
- Letter from March 24th [1896?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from July 20th [1867]
- Letter from [1867]
- Letter from Aug 27th 1858
- Letter from March 19th [1855]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
